name: Nutrition Counseling Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for medical nutrition therapy, preventive medicine counseling related to nutrition, nutritional screening, and obesity-related dietary counseling services. Used in weight management, diabetes care, and BMI/obesity counseling quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Medical nutrition therapy; initial assessment and intervention, individual, face-to-face, each 15 minutes
Medical nutrition therapy; re-assessment and intervention, individual, face-to-face, each 15 minutes
Medical nutrition therapy; group (2 or more individuals), each 30 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 15 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 30 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 45 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 60 minutes

Medical nutrition therapy; reassessment and subsequent intervention(s) following second referral in same year for change in diagnosis, medical condition or treatment regimen (including additional hours needed for renal disease), individual, face to face with the patient, each 15 minutes

Medical nutrition therapy, reassessment and subsequent intervention(s) following second referral in same year for change in diagnosis, medical condition, or treatment regimen (including additional hours needed for renal disease), group (2 or more individuals), each 30 minutes
Nutritional screening performed and results documented
